title: B100Lib
body:
This is a library mod for my other mods. It doesn't change anything about the game, but it adds this awesome screen, which can be accessed through [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu):
![cool buttons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae12ec2cb86bb16ecfe65fc3a0414f76ead7b95c_0.webp)
For now I would recommend against other people using it in their mods as I might make breaking changes, but it is MIT licensed, so you can take code if you need anything.
